examples: Joanne had a small dark birthmark near her hairline.
He suffered a hairline fracture of the right index finger.
ZFW-T003 (case: black hairline, dial: black, band: black fabric)
Spots associated with measles normally appear a few days later on the neck or hairline.
Nor is it an elaborately engineered coif to hide a hairline in retreat, as many Trump-watchers imagine.
